response.justification: Candidate is a strong individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the resume shows no evidence of the executive-level leadership, team scaling (10→30+), production multi-agent AI systems, or fintech-infrastructure ownership required for a CTO role. Titles cap at Staff/Senior Software Engineer with no people-management, board-communication, or architectural-domain ownership track record. AI-agent exposure is recent (since April 2025) and described as 'contributing to' tooling rather than designing production agentic systems.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed/low-latency systems
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Brief fintech-adjacent experience at RIDE Capital with TDD/CI/CD discipline
concerns: No senior technical leadership roles; never held CTO/VP/Director or managed engineers at scale
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes environments
No evidence of scaling teams, governing outsourced delivery, or board-level communication

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
